MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MY NGUYEN'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement.

My Nguyen's unopposed motion to approved Prop 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. Order and Judgment are signed.
